'''Faargau''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Zug system/Legends|Zug system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. A planet with fourteen [[Moon/Legends|moons]], Faargau was one of four [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giants]] in the [[Star system/Legends|star system]] along with [[Zauhu]], [[Urazuun]], and [[Laazrau]].<ref name="Aargau" />

==Behind the scenes==
Faargau was first mentioned briefly in "Three Simple Laws," the first part of the ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' article series ''[[Aargau: For All Your Banking Needs]]'', which was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published on the [[Wizards.com]] website in [[2003]].<ref name="Aargau" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Zug [[Star system/Legends|system]], thereby including Faargau, in grid square L-10.<ref name="TEA" />
